themes.exampleQuote: love a spot in Pittsburgh that has later hours for an amazing post dinner sweet treat
Not just your normal sugary affair but elevated with unique flavor and texture
awesome baked goods but really needs a quality/service check on coffee
they've always had issues regarding speed of service... we wound up leaving both times
Amazing stop for a date night or after dinner

notable_quote: Not just your normal sugary affair but elevated with unique flavor and texture; you can tell a lot of time and love went into crafting those recipes.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers consistently celebrate the inventive vegan pastry program and the late-night hours, while a recurring undercurrent of complaints targets coffee preparation and lines that move slowly enough to cost the shop actual sales.
quarter_narrative: Three Pittsburgh TikTok creators filmed Butterwood this quarter and collectively pulled nearly 3,800 plays, with a single video of the banana espresso cake driving the majority of those views. The business posted nothing to Instagram in those same 30 days, and has not posted at all in over 500 days. The city is doing the storytelling; Butterwood is not doing any of it back. Allegheny Coffee and Tea Exchange leads the Pittsburgh Cafes family this issue on social momentum, a signal where Butterwood currently ranks near the bottom of the ten-business group. The path upward in this family runs directly through reclaiming the narrative that creators are already writing for it.
tldr_read: A visually strong, creator-attractive cafe with 736 reviews and a dormant Instagram, sitting at second in Pittsburgh Cafes and fifth in the broader family.
tldr_meaning: The visual catalog and creator fit axes are already performing above the family typical; the Instagram momentum signal is what separates this business from a higher family rank.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: Second In Pittsburgh Cafes, Built On Pastry Depth. The Instagram Has Been Quiet For 515 Days.

playbook.headline: Restart the Instagram account now
playbook.action: The account has been dormant for 515 days; one post per week of the pastry case alone would reopen the momentum signal.

playbook.headline: Address the coffee and service complaints publicly
playbook.action: Two of seven sampled reviews cite coffee failures or line abandonment; a specific operational response in replies moves sentiment off a flat 79.

playbook.headline: Tag back the three TikTok creators
playbook.action: Courtney Camp's banana espresso cake video pulled 2,918 plays; a repost or story share converts earned creator reach into owned visibility at zero cost.
